title: Workspace manifest
description: Formal schema for a workspace manifest per D7 (workspace kind). The workspace = manifest + state; this schema covers the *manifest* (declarative — what this workspace IS). Runtime state (events, work-units, scope) is event-sourced and validated per its own kinds' schemas. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., that bound shape resolves; substrate-bindings provide capabilities required by other bound extensions; actor.substrate-binding refs an existing binding-id) is out of scope per D28 — handled by the framework conformance validator at boot per D29 validation flow.

id.description: Stable, unique workspace identifier (D7 §1). Persists across full lifecycle; same id = same composition lineage + state lineage.

description.description: Optional human-readable description; not load-bearing at framework-core.

composition.description: Declarative bindings the workspace composes (D7 §2). Validated at boot per D29 validation flow.

extensions.description: Extensions this workspace references, by (id, version-range). Resolved at boot per D29; vocabulary registrations + provisions become available to subsequent bindings. May be [] (a workspace using only core kinds with no extensions).

shape.description: Exactly 1 shape per workspace (D7 §2). References a shape provision by fully-qualified <ext-id>:<id> per D29.

configuration.description: Shape-specific configuration; structure per the referenced shape's documented configuration schema (extension-defined).

substrate-bindings.description: 1+ substrate bindings (D7 §2 + §4). Each binding selects exactly one runtime-shape. Multiple bindings of the same substrate (different runtime-shapes) allowed.

binding-id.description: Stable id within this workspace; referenced by agent-actors per D9 + D22.

provision.description: Fully-qualified substrate provision reference. Either provision or required-capabilities must be supplied (specific identity vs capability-based vs mixed per D12).

actors.description: 1+ actors (D7 §2; D9). Each entry validates against actor.schema.json.

adapter-bindings.description: 0+ adapter bindings (D7 §2). Each references an adapter provision by fully-qualified id and supplies binding-time configuration.

configuration.description: Adapter-specific config; schema is extension-declared per protocol (D16).

qualified-identifier.description: Extension-namespaced reference of the form <extension-id>:<identifier> per D29.
